from fastapi import FastAPI
import httpx

app = FastAPI()

client = httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=30.0)


@app.get("/users/{user_id}")
async def get_user(user_id: int):
    response = await client.get(f"https://api.example.com/users/{user_id}")
    return response.json()


@app.post("/process")
async def process_data(data: dict):
    result = await client.post("https://processor.example.com/run", json=data)
    return result.json()


@app.get("/report")
async def generate_report():
    db_data = await fetch_from_database()
    pdf = await render_pdf(db_data)
    await storage.upload("report.pdf", pdf)
    return {"status": "generated"}


@app.post("/webhook")
async def handle_webhook(payload: dict):
    response = await client.post("https://external.service/hook", json=payload)
    await save_to_db(response.json())
    return {"ok": True}
